name: Prokhorovka default - company/regiment unit scale
description: Operational Prokhorovka sequence: recon and artillery are active at H-hour, first-wave tanks are present/targetable but movement-locked for the opening fire plan, and Soviet reserve waves arrive later to model echeloned commitment.

unit_scale.strength: vehicle/gun count used as aggregate combat power

timeline.historical_label: 1 simulated day, 120 returned frames including initial frame

simulation.layout_note: West axis revised against orientation_2.png: west units now fight along the river-left Petrovka/Beregovoe-to-Olshanka corridor, without extreme map-edge outliers.
